author: nc1234
content:
I think this is a resource issue. After I raise docker VM (or docker desktop for mac) from 12gb ram to 16gb, I can no longer reproduce the issue. This is the config I use, see if you can reproduce
```
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: besu
      el_image: ethpandaops/besu:focil
  cl:
    - cl_type: lighthouse
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lighthouse:focil
    - cl_type: lodestar
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:focil   
network_params:
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  heze_fork_epoch: 2
  preset: minimal
additional_services:
  - dora
  - spamoor
  - tx_fuzz
dora_params:
  image: ensi321/dora:focil-heze   # published: dora master + v0.1.3 go-eth2-client w/ heze envelope fix; schema matches :focil client images
port_publisher:
  additional_services:
    enabled: true
    public_port_start: 65500
spamoor_params:
  spammers:
    - scenario: eoatx
      config:
        throughput: 100
    - scenario: uniswap-swaps
      config:
        throughput: 100
    - scenario: blob-combined
      config:
        throughput: 5

global_log_level: debug
```

author: nc1234
content: `ensi321/dora:focil-heze` is a special dora that is glam devnet-5 based + heze envelope fix

author: nc1234
content: My theory is LH proposing block 3 slots in a row consumes more memory than usual and causes some hiccups. (Kill some claude sessions too as I had like 12 sessions opened at the same time lmao)
